message:
fix(session_store): wrap JSONL appender in BufWriter and modernize format strings

session_store_v2.rs:
- Wrap the append file in std::io::BufWriter to batch write syscalls
  when serializing JSONL index entries, reducing per-frame I/O overhead
- Add explicit flush() to ensure data reaches disk before returning
- Comment updated to reflect buffered vs direct file writes

accuracy_performance_sec63.rs:
- Modernize println! to use inline format args (`{idx}` instead of
  `{}, idx`) per Rust 2021 edition style

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
